channel.title: Hugo on Match Studio
channel.description: Recent content in Hugo on Match Studio

item.title: How To Install PlatformIO On Visual Studio Code
item.description:
Are you tired of the Arduino IDE? Would you like a more professional debugging experience—complete with advanced tools and modern features—right inside the world’s most popular text editor, Visual Studio? Join us in this article as we

  • Installing vscode
  • Installing PlatformIO on vscode
  • setup PlatformIO and Download Boards
  • Write Your First Blink code
  • Build And Flash!

So, stay with us.

Installing VScode

  • Download VScode from here
  • Open File Manager and Open File Downloaded Directory
  • Duble Click VScode And Install

Install PlatformIO
